title: No convention governs the substrate data-model representation + field-kind merge semantics
description: No convention governs the substrate data-model representation and field-kind merge semantics (e.g. convergent ordered-sequence CRDT). DEC-0005 was decided in this domain without a governing convention.

evidence.reference: conventions block has no rule covering data-model representation / merge field-kinds

proposed_resolution: Author a convention governing data-model representation + merge field-kind semantics; re-point DEC-0005 to item_governed_by_convention; close this gap.
